message:
chore(gitignore): exclude beads daemon rotated log archives

The beads daemon produces .log.gz rotated archives in .beads/ that
should not be tracked — they are transient operational artifacts
generated per-daemon run.

- Added .beads/daemon-*.log.gz pattern to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,3 +97,6 @@ session_export.html
 flamegraph.svg
 perf.data
 perf.data.old
+
+# Beads daemon rotated logs
+.beads/daemon-*.log.gz
